description: A GPS ear tag on a beef steer sends an alert that it has breached a virtual geofence, indicating it has escaped its pasture.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the specific animal and its last known location.

nodes.task_description: Send an immediate SMS notification to the rancher with the animal's ID and current GPS coordinates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the alert notification.

nodes.task_description: Provide a map showing the animal's location relative to the breached geofence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and displays a map for the rancher.
